scripts.build: sass assets/sass/main.scss dist/main.css && esbuild assets/ts/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/main.js && esbuild assets/ts/browser.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/browser.js && esbuild assets/ts/breakpoints.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/breakpoints.js && esbuild assets/ts/util.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/util.js
